prose: Ethylene frontier-orbital gap computed via DFT, tier 'standard' (B3LYP/def2-TZVP with density fitting, PySCF), in gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied ethylene.xyz (single-point, not re-optimized). SCF converged in 6 cycles. HOMO–LUMO gap = 7.435717 eV (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy). Full frontier-orbital manifesto and Koopmans descriptors (IP, EA, electronegativity, hardness, softness, electrophilicity) reported above.
